positional_bias.note: Derived from GIFT: q1=pos2, q2=pos0, q3=pos1, q4=pos3, q5=pos2. Matches sidecar correct_position_distribution [2,0,1,3,2]. No desync. max_share=2/5=0.40; threshold is strictly >0.40, so this passes.

length_bias.note: Only q4 marginally exceeds 1.20x (113 vs 112.4 threshold). Rate 1/5=0.20, well under the 0.40 limit. Cycle 1 failure resolved: correct answers trimmed and distractors expanded across q1, q3, q5.

distractor_plausibility.note: All distractors score >=2 (wrong-but-unrelated at minimum). q1-distractor-0 scores 2 (number-of-tools confusion is unrelated to core distinction but not absurd). No score=1 found.

beginner_fairness_and_scope.note: All stems use corpus-defined vocabulary (rubric, criteria, findings summary, evidence anchor, recommendation statement). No acronyms undefined. All correct answers and distractors are grounded exclusively in this topic's corpus §5.1-§5.6.

verdict: Pass — all checks clean: positional max_share 0.40 (not > threshold), length bias rate 0.20 (1/5, well under 0.40), zero absurd distractors (absurd_rate 0.00), all 6 LOs covered 1-to-1, no out-of-scope items.
